silhouette: Model-sheet rounded six-sided hexagon silhouette with clean edges and a controlled, balanced frame; one rounded central top peak, two sloped upper sides, two vertical side walls, rounded lower base, exactly six exterior sides and six rounded corners, with no star points.
face: Large dot eyes, measured smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper left side.
do_not_change: Keep the model-sheet rounded six-sided hexagon shape with one rounded central top peak and two sloped upper sides.
Do not turn her into any star shape, a five-point star, a six-point star, a pentagon, a flat-topped stop-sign/octagon, Sunny Spritz's soft five-point star, or a generic polygon mascot.
Keep the composed and exact posture.
Do not over-soften her into a loose comedic silhouette.
